title: bunium bulbocastanum var. mediterraneum
intro: Bunium bulbocastanum var. mediterraneum, also known as the lesser burnet, is a plant species within the carrot family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Bunium bulbocastanum var. mediterraneum include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its use as a digestive aid to reduce inflammation in the digestive tract. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried roots and leaves in hot water.
